theoretical_foundations: Christopher Alexander: 15 Properties of Life (strong centers, boundaries, levels of scale, void, not-separateness)
David Bohm: Implicate/Explicate Order (hidden structure → documented TUPs)
Giulio Tononi: Integrated Information Theory (Φ, mutual information, consciousness as integrated information)
W. Ross Ashby: Law of Requisite Variety (41 TUPs match market complexity, variety enables control)
operational_protocols: 75 Questions Protocol (context transfer via structured interrogation)
Virtual Twin Specification (Claude agent with maximal mutual information)
Pattern Language Application (Alexander methodology → OpKit extraction)
